# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow for our Python application CI/CD. Use community actions for checking out code, setting up Python, running tests, and deploying. Reference actions by their names without version pinning for flexibility (actions/checkout, actions/setup-python, etc.). We want to automatically get the latest versions.

Write secure code.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Python Application CI/CD

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  lint:
    name: Lint Code
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: "3.12"
          cache: "pip"

      - name: Install linting dependencies
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install flake8 black isort bandit safety

      - name: Run black (formatting check)
        run: black --check --diff .

      - name: Run isort (import sorting check)
        run: isort --check-only --diff .

      - name: Run flake8 (linting)
        run: flake8 . --count --show-source --statistics --max-line-length=120

      - name: Run bandit (security linting)
        run: bandit -r src/ -f json -o bandit-report.json || true

      - name: Upload bandit report
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: bandit-security-report
          path: bandit-report.json
          retention-days: 30

  test:
    name: Test (Python ${{ matrix.python-version }})
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: lint
    permissions:
      contents: read
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        python-version: ["3.10", "3.11", "3.12"]

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Python ${{ matrix.python-version }}
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ matrix.python-version }}
          cache: "pip"

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install -r requirements.txt
          pip install pytest pytest-cov pytest-xdist

      - name: Check dependency vulnerabilities
        run: |
          pip install safety
          safety check --output json > safety-report.json || true

      - name: Run tests with coverage
        env:
          PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE: "1"
          PYTHONUNBUFFERED: "1"
        run: |
          pytest tests/ \
            --cov=src \
            --cov-report=xml:coverage.xml \
            --cov-report=html:htmlcov \
            --cov-fail-under=80 \
            --junitxml=test-results.xml \
            -n auto \
            -v

      - name: Upload coverage report
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        if: matrix.python-version == '3.12'
        with:
          name: coverage-report
          path: |
            coverage.xml
            htmlcov/
          retention-days: 30

      - name: Upload test results
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        if: always()
        with:
          name: test-results-py${{ matrix.python-version }}
          path: test-results.xml
          retention-days: 30

  build:
    name: Build Package
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: test
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: "3.12"
          cache: "pip"

      - name: Install build dependencies
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install build wheel

      - name: Build package
        run: python -m build

      - name: Verify package
        run: |
          pip install twine
          twine check dist/*

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: dist-packages
          path: dist/
          retention-days: 30

  deploy-staging:
    name: Deploy to Staging
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/develop' && github.event_name == 'push'
    permissions:
      contents: read
    environment:
      name: staging
      url: ${{ vars.STAGING_URL }}
    concurrency:
      group: deploy-staging
      cancel-in-progress: false

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: dist-packages
          path: dist/

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: "3.12"

      - name: Deploy to staging
        env:
          DEPLOY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.STAGING_DEPLOY_TOKEN }}
          DEPLOY_HOST: ${{ secrets.STAGING_DEPLOY_HOST }}
        run: |
          if [ -z "$DEPLOY_TOKEN" ] || [ -z "$DEPLOY_HOST" ]; then
            echo "::error::Required deployment secrets are not configured"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "Deploying to staging environment..."
          # Replace with actual deployment commands
          # Example: scp, rsync, or API-based deployment
          echo "Staging deployment completed successfully"

  deploy-production:
    name: Deploy to Production
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    permissions:
      contents: read
      id-token: write
    environment:
      name: production
      url: ${{ vars.PRODUCTION_URL }}
    concurrency:
      group: deploy-production
      cancel-in-progress: false

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: dist-packages
          path: dist/

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: "3.12"

      - name: Verify artifact integrity
        run: |
          pip install twine
          twine check dist/*

      - name: Publish to PyPI
        uses: pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish@release/v1
        with:
          packages-dir: dist/

      - name: Deploy to production
        env:
          DEPLOY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_TOKEN }}
          DEPLOY_HOST: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_HOST }}
        run: |
          if [ -z "$DEPLOY_TOKEN" ] || [ -z "$DEPLOY_HOST" ]; then
            echo "::error::Required deployment secrets are not configured"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "Deploying to production environment..."
          # Replace with actual deployment commands
          echo "Production deployment completed successfully"

      - name: Create GitHub Release Tag
        if: success()
        run: |
          VERSION=$(python -c "import importlib.metadata; print(importlib.metadata.version('your-package-name'))" 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
          echo "Deployed version: $VERSION"
